growth_records.cite: Tanouti et al. Structural insight into the novel Thermus thermophilus SPOUT methyltransferase RlmR catalysing Um2552 formation in the 23S rRNA A-loop: a case of convergent evolution. Nucleic Acids Research (2025). DOI:10.1093/nar/gkaf432. [PMC12123411]
growth_records.snippet: To determine whether growth is affected by the loss of RlmR, the growth rates of WT and mutant ΔrlmR T. thermophilus strains were compared. At 70°C, the doubling times for both strains were similar (WT: 71 ± 7 min; ΔrlmR
growth_records.notes: Doubling time (71 ± 7 min) explicitly reported in text for WT T. thermophilus grown in TSB at 70°C. doubling_time_h = 71/60 = 1.183 h. growth_rate_per_h (mu) calculated as ln2/doubling_time_h = 0.693/1.183 = 0.586 h-1. Oxygenation/aeration and pH not stated in text so left null; medium composition not detailed beyond 'TSB' (commercial formulation, not itemized in paper). [metadata completed from paper Methods: oxygen]

growth_records.cite: Tanouti et al. Structural insight into the novel Thermus thermophilus SPOUT methyltransferase RlmR catalysing Um2552 formation in the 23S rRNA A-loop: a case of convergent evolution. Nucleic Acids Research (2025). DOI:10.1093/nar/gkaf432. [PMC12123411]
growth_records.snippet: To determine whether growth is affected by the loss of RlmR, the growth rates of WT and mutant ΔrlmR T. thermophilus strains were compared. At 70°C, the doubling times for both strains were similar (WT: 71 ± 7 min; ΔrlmR
growth_records.notes: Doubling time (68 ± 12 min) explicitly reported in text for ΔrlmR (ttc1712 deletion) T. thermophilus grown in TSB at 70°C. doubling_time_h = 68/60 = 1.133 h. growth_rate_per_h (mu) calculated as ln2/doubling_time_h = 0.693/1.133 = 0.612 h-1. Oxygenation/aeration and pH not stated in text so left null; medium composition not detailed beyond 'TSB' (commercial formulation, not itemized in paper). [metadata completed from paper Methods: oxygen]
